parameters.jsCode:
const a = $('Code: Build AD user attributes').first().json;

// Core attributes — always included
const core = [
  { id: 'objectClass',        value: a.objectClass },
  { id: 'sAMAccountName',     value: a.sAMAccountName },
  { id: 'userPrincipalName',  value: a.userPrincipalName },
  { id: 'cn',                 value: a.cn },
  { id: 'displayName',        value: a.displayName },
  { id: 'givenName',          value: a.givenName },
  { id: 'sn',                 value: a.sn },
  { id: 'title',              value: a.title },
  { id: 'company',            value: a.company },
  { id: 'streetAddress',      value: a.streetAddress },
  { id: 'l',                  value: a.l },
  { id: 'st',                 value: a.st },
  { id: 'postalCode',         value: a.postalCode },
  { id: 'telephoneNumber',    value: a.telephoneNumber },
  { id: 'userAccountControl', value: '514' },
  { id: 'mail',               value: a.mail },
];

// Optional attributes — only include if non-empty
const optional = [
  { id: 'pager',   value: a.pager },
  { id: 'ipPhone', value: a.ipPhone },
  { id: 'info',    value: a.info },
].filter(attr => String(attr.value ?? '').trim() !== '');

return [{ json: { ...a, createAttributes: [...core, ...optional] } }];

const a = $('Code: Build AD user attributes').first().json;
return (a.groupDns || []).map(dn => ({ json: { groupDn: dn, userDn: a.dn } }));
